title: ChatWebSocketCapability empty struct needs usage guidance in doc
description: jmap.rs: ChatWebSocketCapability is a public empty struct. Its doc comment describes the wire format and lists the event types it enables, but gives callers no guidance on what to do with an instance. Since the struct carries no data, the actionable API is Session::supports_chat_websocket. The doc should point callers to that method and explain this type exists only as a forward-compatible placeholder for fields the spec may add later.
